headline: I tried Siri AI, and so far it actually works
summary: The new Siri AI can now extract calendar events from emails and flyers. This feature is particularly useful for parents managing schedules. The updated Siri is showing promise in practical, everyday tasks.

headline: Congress just gave DHS another $70 billion
summary: Congress approved $70 billion in funding for the Department of Homeland Security. The funds will support President Trump's mass deportation agenda over three years. Both House and Senate votes were narrow and largely along party lines.

headline: The App Store is going to add subscription bundles soon
summary: Apple is introducing subscription bundles to the App Store later this year. Bundles will allow combining offers from various app companies. This feature mirrors existing streaming video bundles, offering combined subscription deals.

headline: GM thinks EVs can help offset AI’s energy suck with vehicle-to-grid tech
summary: GM announced new vehicle-to-grid (V2G) capabilities for its EVs. V2G tech aims to offset energy demand from AI data centers and improve grid resiliency. The automaker made announcements regarding EV batteries, energy storage, and grid stability.

headline: Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave Sets Standard Physical Price at $80
summary: "Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave" has revealed its launch date. The standard physical edition will cost $80 USD. Fans now know the anticipated price point for the new game.

headline: Xbox Will 'Try and Do More' Exclusives Once the 'Business is Healthy', Says Asha Sharma
summary: Xbox plans to increase exclusive titles in the future. This commitment to exclusives is conditional on the business's health. Asha Sharma indicated that more exclusives depend on financial performance.

headline: Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave — Here's What Comes With Each Edition
summary: Details on different editions of "Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave" are available. Players can see what content is included with each version. Information helps buyers choose their preferred game edition.

headline: Treat Dad to a Brand New Pair of Apple AirPods Pro 3 Earbuds for Father's Day, Now 20% Off at Amazon
summary: Apple AirPods Pro 3 earbuds are currently 20% off on Amazon. This Father's Day deal highlights them as a gift option. They are praised as top noise-canceling earbuds for iPhone users.

headline: Disorder breaks out in Belfast after man charged over knife attack
summary: Disorder erupted in Belfast following charges over a knife attack. Residents were forced to evacuate their homes due to the unrest. Public transportation services have been suspended in the city.

headline: David Sullivan banned from contact with West Ham women's and youth teams since 2023
summary: David Sullivan has been banned from contact with West Ham's women's and youth teams. The ban has been in effect since 2023. This decision came after a safeguarding investigation by the Football Association.

headline: Inside Myanmar, rebels are losing ground as military forces men into army
summary: Rebel forces in Myanmar are reportedly losing territory. The military is forcibly conscripting men into the army. A BBC report from the frontlines details the war's progression.

headline: The rebels at the front line of Myanmar's civil war
summary: BBC's Quentin Sommerville reported from Myanmar's civil war front lines. He met with rebel fighters without official permission. The report offers an inside look at the conflict.
